title: senecio cinerascens
intro: Senecio cinerascens, also known as Grey Ragwort, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States. The medicinal properties of Senecio cinerascens include its use as a respiratory aid, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Senecio cinerascens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
